creator: rick@lgarchitecture.com
text:
It looks like my compressed and uuencoded attachment got messed up
somehow.  It looks OK in the raw PR but I don't know if anyone is going
to take the time to try to decode and unpack it.  Here is a link to the
diff of the grub2 update:
http://www.sloservers.com/grub2-1.98-zfs.diff
Hope that helps this move along.
